name: Diagnostic Cerebral Angiogram
description: Diagnostic cerebral angiography report template for evaluation of intracranial vasculature

findings.technique: Diagnostic cerebral angiography was performed via right femoral artery approach using a 5F catheter. Selective injections of the bilateral internal carotid arteries, external carotid arteries, and vertebral arteries were performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Internal Carotid Injection
sections.content: The internal carotid artery demonstrates [normal caliber / no stenosis / no aneurysm / no dissection]. The intracranial circulation is [normal / patent].

sections.name: Anterior Cerebral Artery
sections.content: The A1 segment of the anterior cerebral artery is [present / hypoplastic]. The A2 segment and distal branches are [normal / patent].

sections.name: Middle Cerebral Artery
sections.content: The M1 segment of the middle cerebral artery is [normal / no stenosis / no occlusion]. The M2 branches are [normal / patent].

sections.name: Posterior Cerebral Artery
sections.content: The P1 segment of the posterior cerebral artery is [present / hypoplastic]. The P2-P4 segments are [normal / patent].

sections.name: Vertebrobasilar Injection
sections.content: The vertebral artery is [patent / normal]. The basilar artery is [normal / no aneurysm]. The posterior inferior cerebellar artery is [visualized / normal].

sections.name: Circle of Willis
sections.content: The circle of Willis is [complete / incomplete]. The anterior and posterior communicating arteries are [patent / present].

sections.name: External Carotid
sections.content: The external carotid artery and its branches are [normal / no pathology]. The middle meningeal artery is [patent / normal].

sections.name: Venous Phase
sections.content: The venous phase demonstrates [normal venous drainage / no dural sinus thrombosis / no venous congestion].

impression:
1. Normal diagnostic cerebral angiogram.
2. No aneurysm, stenosis, or vascular malformation identified.
author: RadReport Templates
